query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime view of an empty paved road with a metal guardrail running along the right side. A bright streetlamp on the right illuminates part of the road and nearby vegetation. Road signs are visible in the distance near the center of the frame. A concrete barrier with diagonal stripes and an additional signpost appear on the left side. The sky and surrounding areas are dark, with trees and foliage receding into the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime view of an empty paved road under a bright streetlamp that bathes the scene in a sickly sodium-vapor yellow cast. The image employs extreme exposure contrasts, with the streetlamp blown out in a harsh starburst while the surrounding sky and landscape sink into near-total underexposure. A metal guardrail runs along the right side of the road, and distant road signs stand near a striped concrete barrier on the left. The oppressive darkness and isolating emptiness of the scene evoke a mood of dread and unease.
